objective: Translate every remaining authorized Chinese program-tree label to approved technical English using visual reasoning only, while preserving every original and an empty future Russian slot in durable state.
context: Chinese KV STUDIO is only the current visible application, not an automation assumption. Work application-agnostically from pixels. Offline project copy. Domain: automated precious-metal acceptance kiosk, robotic arm, coarse/fine weighing, induction furnace for gold and precious-metal melting, and XRF analyzer for assay and valuation.
